narrative:
North Randall City has 685 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 2.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 48.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 46.6 percentage points.
